zh.of West Hall, High Legh, Cheshire, Engla: 英國英格蘭爾希 萊
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Legh於1305年出生在英國英格蘭爾諾波利時，她的父親John de Legh Venables I26歲，母親Elena de Baguley25歲。她於1318年與Richard Fitton在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1379年在她的家鄉享年74歲。

zh-hans.Knutsford, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾可努恰福德

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Legh于1305年出生在英国英格兰爾諾波利时，她的父亲John de Legh Venables I26岁，母亲Elena de Baguley25岁。她于1318年与Richard Fitton在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1379年在她的家乡享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Legh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Leigh
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Legh was born in 1305, in Norbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John de Legh Venables I, was 26 and her mother, Elena de Baguley, was 25. She married Richard Fitton in 1318, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1379, in her hometown, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Legh est née en 1305, à Norbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Legh Venables I, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elena de Baguley, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Fitton en 1318, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1379, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Legh 1305 in Norbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Legh Venables I 26 und ihre Mutter Elena de Baguley 25. Sie hat 1318 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Richard Fitton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1379 im Alter von 74 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

Lei sposato Richard Fitton nel 1318, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1379, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Leghが1305年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアノーブリーで生まれた時，父John de Legh Venables Iは26歳，母Elena de Baguleyは25歳であった。1318年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでRichard Fittonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1379年に故郷で74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Legh(이)가 1305년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 노르버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Legh Venables I(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elena de Baguley(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1318년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Richard Fitton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1379년 그녀의 고향에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Richard Fitton em 1318, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1379, em sua cidade natal, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Legh родилась в 1305 г. в местности норбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John de Legh Venables I было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elena de Baguley, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Fitton в 1318 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1379 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 74 лет.

Se casó con Richard Fitton en 1318, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1379, en su pueblo, a la edad de 74 años.
